titleZh: 企业名称登记管理规定实施办法
titleEn: Implementation Measures for the Provisions on the Registration and Administration of Enterprise Names
shortTitle: 企业名称登记管理规定实施办法
issuingBodyZh: 国家市场监督管理总局
summaryZh: 细化企业名称禁限用、相同相近比对、争议裁决和登记机关职责，是企业名称审查与纠纷处理的现行操作规则。
summaryEn: The current SAMR rule detailing prohibited and restricted wording, similarity review, name disputes, and registrar responsibilities for enterprise-name administration.
